mapper.select: select * from ygt_group_order where ygt_go_candidate_id = #{candidateId} limit 1

select count(*) as orderCount, count(distinct coalesce(ygt_go_external_user_id, ygt_go_member_identifier, ygt_go_from_user)) as customerCount, coalesce(sum(ygt_go_total_amount), 0) as totalAmount from ygt_group_order where ygt_go_campaign_id = #{campaignId} and ygt_go_status = 'CONFIRMED'
mapper.insert: insert into ygt_group_order (ygt_go_candidate_id, ygt_go_campaign_id, ygt_go_corp_id, ygt_go_group_id, ygt_go_nx_community_id, ygt_go_chat_id, ygt_go_source_chat_message_id, ygt_go_from_user, ygt_go_member_identifier, ygt_go_external_user_id, ygt_go_customer_name_snapshot, ygt_go_status, ygt_go_pickup_code, ygt_go_total_amount, ygt_go_confirm_user_id, ygt_go_confirm_time, ygt_go_remark, ygt_go_create_time, ygt_go_update_time) values (#{ygtGoCandidateId}, #{ygtGoCampaignId}, #{ygtGoCorpId}, #{ygtGoGroupId}, #{ygtGoNxCommunityId}, #{ygtGoChatId}, #{ygtGoSourceChatMessageId}, #{ygtGoFromUser}, #{ygtGoMemberIdentifier}, #{ygtGoExternalUserId}, #{ygtGoCustomerNameSnapshot}, #{ygtGoStatus}, #{ygtGoPickupCode}, #{ygtGoTotalAmount}, #{ygtGoConfirmUserId}, #{ygtGoConfirmTime}, #{ygtGoRemark}, #{ygtGoCreateTime}, #{ygtGoUpdateTime})
mapper.delete: delete from ygt_group_order where ygt_group_order_id in #{id}
